strings.briefing.m1.1: Joe, we have little time, so I will be brief. The war has reached our last province — it still stands only thanks to you.
strings.briefing.m1.2: Your home and your fortress are part of an ancient defence system. Every province we win back will work for you, Joe — so your tower grows stronger. So that WE can win.
strings.briefing.m10.1: Mission 10: Another Business Trip. Hold the line, Joe.
strings.briefing.m11.1: Mission 11: Lemmings. Hold the line, Joe.
strings.briefing.m12.1: Mission 12: Problems Start I. Hold the line, Joe.
strings.briefing.m13.1: Mission 13: Problems Start II. Hold the line, Joe.
strings.briefing.m14.1: Mission 14: Problems Start III. Hold the line, Joe.
strings.briefing.m15.1: Mission 15: The Real Fargo. Hold the line, Joe.
strings.briefing.m16.1: Mission 16: Apples of Hesperides. Hold the line, Joe.
strings.briefing.m18.1: Mission 18: I'll Make You Rich. Hold the line, Joe.
strings.briefing.m19.1: Mission 19: Echo of War. Hold the line, Joe.
strings.briefing.m2.1: Well, Joe... We have a little problem. Enemy scouts have run into us. There is just a handful of them, but soon the hordes will follow.
strings.briefing.m2.2: Destroy everything that can be destroyed. Oh, yes! If you do well, you will be generously rewarded by the company.
strings.briefing.m20.1: Mission 20: The Crucial Point. Hold the line, Joe.
strings.briefing.m21.1: Mission 21: The Golden Train. Hold the line, Joe.
strings.briefing.m22.1: Mission 22: "As good as Mozart". Hold the line, Joe.
strings.briefing.m23.1: Mission 23: Pull Devil!. Hold the line, Joe.
strings.briefing.m24.1: Mission 24: Pull Devil! II. Hold the line, Joe.
strings.briefing.m25.1: Mission 25: Dragon's Rag. Hold the line, Joe.
strings.briefing.m26.1: Mission 26: Earl Furious. Hold the line, Joe.
strings.briefing.m27.1: Mission 27: That Damned King. Hold the line, Joe.
strings.briefing.m28.1: Mission 28: Near Go. Hold the line, Joe.
strings.briefing.m29.1: Mission 29: Prelude. Hold the line, Joe.
strings.briefing.m3.1: Joe, you may have noticed that I turn to you only with problems. Such is life: I find problems — you solve them.
strings.briefing.m3.2: Damned invaders continue their wicked work. This time their target is the Royal gold mine. Do not let them rob me... ahem, rob the King. If everything goes smoothly, I promise to repair your tower.
strings.briefing.m3.3: Are you going to deduct the impudence tax again?
strings.briefing.m3.4: Depends on your behavior, my dear Joe.
strings.briefing.m30.1: Mission 30: A Quick Mare Is In Time Everywhere. Hold the line, Joe.
strings.briefing.m4.1: Mission 4: Enemy At the Gate. Hold the line, Joe.
strings.briefing.m5.1: Mission 5: I need to go. Hold the line, Joe.
strings.briefing.m6.1: Mission 6: Touchy Issue. Hold the line, Joe.
strings.briefing.m7.1: Mission 7: A Steak. Hold the line, Joe.
strings.briefing.m8.1: Mission 8: Shopping. Hold the line, Joe.
strings.briefing.m9.1: Mission 9: Royal Gold 2. Hold the line, Joe.
strings.epilogue.m2.1: Well, Joe, here's your hard-earned 70 Gold.
strings.epilogue.m2.3: Joe, are you a law-abiding citizen? Have you heard about taxes?
strings.epilogue.m2.4: Yes, Fargo, I know what taxes are: I work — you screw around, and the treasury grows. Have I got it right?
strings.epilogue.m2.5: I bet you haven't heard about the impudence tax yet, my dear old Joe. I've just invented it, by the way.
strings.epilogue.m2.7: You are welcome, Joe. Ok, let's turn to our muttons.
strings.epilogue.m3.1: Well done, Joe. I've given an order to repair your tower.
strings.epilogue.m3.2: How many percent will they repair?
strings.epilogue.m3.3: Depends on your deeds, Joe. Depends on your deeds...
strings.game.result.defeat: The castle has fallen. Joe will remember this.
strings.game.result.victory: The province is safe… for now. Gold earned: {gold}
strings.map.briefing.title: Mission {n} — {name}
strings.map.mission-locked: Mission {n} is locked — clear the previous one first.
strings.map.province-safe: The province is safe — replay any mission.
strings.menu.subtitle: Sky Defender Remaster — M0 flow skeleton
strings.mission.goal.3: Defend the Royal gold mine — don't let them steal the gold.
strings.mission.name.30: A Quick Mare Is In Time Everywhere
strings.shop.hint: Hover an item for details. Click to buy.
strings.shop.item.air-gun.desc: Anti-aircraft weapon fires over the sights all by itself.
strings.shop.item.air-gun.name: Air Gun
strings.shop.item.air-support.desc: Royal Air Cavalry strikes every 30 s while HP is under 50%.
strings.shop.item.air-support.name: Air Support
strings.shop.item.fire-shells.desc: Fargo found fire balls somewhere. High detonation, more damage.
strings.shop.item.fire-shells.name: Fire Shells
strings.shop.item.flag.desc: The flag of your Fatherland adds 100 Health Points.
strings.shop.item.flag.name: Flag
strings.shop.item.floor-1.desc: Your humble hut. Everything starts here.
strings.shop.item.floor-1.name: Castle Floor 1
strings.shop.item.floor-2.desc: Raises Castle HP to 1000. The main gun moves up here.
strings.shop.item.floor-2.name: Castle Floor 2
strings.shop.item.floor-3.desc: Better accommodation: HP up to 1300 and one more gun slot.
strings.shop.item.floor-3.name: Castle Floor 3
strings.shop.item.floor-4.desc: No conservatory — an AA weapon platform. 1600 HP total.
strings.shop.item.floor-4.name: Castle Floor 4
strings.shop.item.gun-power.name: Gun Power
strings.shop.item.gun-reload.desc: Cleaned and oiled: the Gun reloads much faster.
strings.shop.item.gun-reload.name: Reload Speed
strings.shop.item.gun.desc: The Royal Armory classic. Better than nothing.
strings.shop.item.gun.name: Big Gun
strings.shop.item.mine-defender.desc: Joe’s brother lays automatic mines on the bridge.
strings.shop.item.mine-defender.name: Crazy Mineman
strings.shop.item.minigun-power.name: Minigun Power
strings.shop.item.minigun-reload.desc: A trained loader crew keeps the drums coming.
strings.shop.item.minigun-reload.name: Reload Speed
strings.shop.item.minigun.desc: Four shells in four barrels, 100 bullets in the clip. A dream!
strings.shop.item.minigun.name: Minigun
strings.shop.item.rail-gun.desc: If only I had this from the beginning… the war would be over.
strings.shop.item.rail-gun.name: Rail Gun
strings.shop.item.repair.desc: Patch the walls: restores 400 Health Points.
strings.shop.item.repair.name: Repair
strings.shop.item.rifle-power.desc: Match-grade rounds for the long barrel.
strings.shop.item.rifle-power.name: Rifle Power
strings.shop.item.rifle.desc: One shot — one corpse. Powerful, accurate, slow to recharge.
strings.shop.item.rifle.name: Sniper Rifle
strings.shop.item.shotgun-power.desc: Tighter charges: every pellet hits harder.
strings.shop.item.shotgun-power.name: Shotgun Power
strings.shop.item.shotgun.desc: Strikes with a fan of cannon balls. A Royal shotgun, no kidding!
strings.shop.item.shotgun.name: Shotgun
strings.shop.item.turret-1.desc: An automatic turret to compensate your fluffs.
strings.shop.item.turret-1.name: Gun 1
strings.shop.item.turret-2.desc: Perhaps in future you won’t have to shoot at all.
strings.shop.item.turret-2.name: Gun 2
strings.shop.item.umbrella.desc: An invisible shield. Cuts damage while Castle HP is under 75%.
strings.shop.item.umbrella.name: Umbrella
